name: Daily Ingest - Overview
description: Replicates the Workspace Home Daily Ingest panels — events/bytes in/out counters with Stream/Edge/Search breakdown.

config.query: dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="MB" | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="GB") | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="TB") | sort by unit asc

search.query: dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="MB" | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="GB") | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="TB") | sort by unit asc

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric in ("total.in_bytes") dist_mode in ("worker","managed-edge")
| where isnull(input)
| extend source=case(dist_mode=="managed-edge", "Edge ingest", worker_group has "search", "Search ingest", "Stream ingest")
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| summarize bytes_in=sum(value / divisor) by _time=bin(_time, 1h), source
| timestats sum(bytes_in) by source

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric="total.in_events" dist_mode="worker"
| where isnull(input)
| summarize total_events_in=sum(value)

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric="total.out_events" dist_mode="worker"
| where isnull(output)
| summarize total_events_out=sum(value)

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric in ("total.in_events","total.out_events") dist_mode="worker"
| where isnull(input) and isnull(output)
| summarize events_in=sum(iff(metric=="total.in_events",value,0)), events_out=sum(iff(metric=="total.out_events",value,0))
| extend events_diff_pct=round(((events_out - events_in) / events_in) * 100, 2)
| project events_diff_pct

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric="total.in_bytes" dist_mode="worker"
| where isnull(input)
| summarize total=sum(value)
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| extend bytes_in=round(total / divisor, 2)
| project bytes_in

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric="total.out_bytes" dist_mode="worker"
| where isnull(output)
| summarize total=sum(value)
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| extend bytes_out=round(total / divisor, 2)
| project bytes_out

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric in ("total.in_bytes","total.out_bytes") dist_mode="worker"
| where isnull(input) and isnull(output)
| summarize bytes_in=sum(iff(metric=="total.in_bytes",value,0)), bytes_out=sum(iff(metric=="total.out_bytes",value,0))
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| extend bytes_diff_pct=round(((bytes_out - bytes_in) / bytes_in) * 100, 2)
| project bytes_diff_pct

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric in ("total.in_events") dist_mode in ("worker","managed-edge")
| where isnull(input)
| extend source=case(dist_mode=="managed-edge", "Edge", worker_group has "search", "Search", "Stream")
| summarize events_in=sum(value) by _time=bin(_time, 1h), source
| timestats sum(events_in) by source

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric in ("total.in_bytes") dist_mode in ("worker","managed-edge")
| where isnull(input)
| extend source=case(dist_mode=="managed-edge", "Edge", worker_group has "search", "Search", "Stream")
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| summarize bytes_in=sum(value / divisor) by _time=bin(_time, 1h), source
| timestats sum(bytes_in) by source

dataset="cribl_metrics" metric in ("total.in_bytes","total.out_bytes","total.in_events","total.out_events") dist_mode in ("worker","managed-edge")
| where isnull(input) and isnull(output)
| extend source=case(dist_mode=="managed-edge", "Edge", worker_group has "search", "Search", "Stream")
| summarize events_in=sum(iff(metric=="total.in_events",value,0)), events_out=sum(iff(metric=="total.out_events",value,0)), bytes_in=sum(iff(metric=="total.in_bytes",value,0)), bytes_out=sum(iff(metric=="total.out_bytes",value,0)) by source
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| extend bytes_in_scaled=round(bytes_in/divisor, 1), bytes_out_scaled=round(bytes_out/divisor, 1), events_diff=events_out - events_in, bytes_diff=round((bytes_out - bytes_in)/divisor, 1)
| project source, events_in, events_out, events_diff, bytes_in_scaled, bytes_out_scaled, bytes_diff
| sort by events_in desc
